recordPlayEntry write failure swallowed (try/catch console.error only, spx-play-engine.ts:915-927) + force-close without outcome row (db.ts:1234-1238) -> a real win/loss can show as never-happened. Genuine code bug independent of the veto fix
reconcileAllMemberships O(users) serial network I/O, no advisory lock, no concurrency bound (membership.ts:210-291) -> times out + races Clerk/Whop entitlement writes across replicas at scale
Polygon leader-lock refresh bare expire() no ownership check, constant value (polygon-socket.ts:149-154) -> GC pause >25s lets two live index sockets coexist
Polygon connect-throw does not release leader lock/flag (polygon-socket.ts:405-409) -> a replica with failing WS construct holds lock forever, starves whole cluster index feed
uw-socket flow_alerts handler does void persistAndPublishFlowAlert per alert with no concurrency bound (uw-socket.ts:592-615) -> open-bell burst = unbounded pending promises on heap
options-socket optionMarks.set never deleted on unsubscribe (options-socket.ts:443) -> monotonic in-memory growth across expiries on long-lived replica
Telemetry read-path per-replica in-memory (api-telemetry.ts:39-42) -> admin dashboard sees 1/N of traffic, rate-limit counts fragmented
Cross-replica cache split-brain on Redis outage (shared-cache.ts:81-143) -> 5 replicas serve divergent GEX walls/tape >=30s with no alarm
Schema-failure re-init stampede (db.ts:663-674) -> on transient DB blip every concurrent caller re-enters createPool() amplifying load on a down DB; needs backoff

spx-desk-merge module-singleton lastGoodStructure read-modify-write per request (spx-desk-merge.ts:82-220) -> concurrent requests cross-contaminate structure levels; grounding hole on a 100%-correct surface
